The Challenge

Sound Familiar?

You're not alone. Every local business owner hits this wall eventually.

No Time for Long-Term SEO

Content strategies that take 6 months to work won't help you pay next month's rent.

Budget Gone to Ads

Facebook and Google ads are expensive and getting more competitive every month.

Don't Know Where to Start

There are a hundred lead generation tactics online — but which ones actually work?

Overwhelmed by Options

Facebook groups, LinkedIn, cold outreach, referrals — it all feels like too much.

Results Are Inconsistent

Some weeks you get leads, others you get nothing. You need a system.

Fear of Wasting Time

What if you try something and it doesn't work? You're already behind.

The Solution

The Fix: A Proven System That Works in Days, Not Months

This isn't another theory or theory. It's 25 tactics that local businesses have used to fill their pipelines fast.

Zero Prep Required

Actions 1-12 can be done RIGHT NOW. No graphics, no funnels, no setup.

30 Minutes or Less

Each action is designed to take under 30 minutes. Some take just 5.

No Ad Budget

All tactics work with zero paid advertising. Pure outreach and relationship building.

Proven Templates

Copy-paste scripts for DMs, emails, phone calls, and social posts.

7-Day Calendar

Day-by-day action plan so you know exactly what to do and when.

Track Everything

Lead tracking sheets to measure results and double down on what works.

What's Inside

Everything You Need to Generate Leads This Week

A complete system, not just a list of tips.

  • 25 Lead Generation Actions

    From social posts to door-to-door, organized by effort and impact.

  • Daily Execution Checklist

    Checklist format so you never miss a task or waste time wondering what to do next.

  • Referral Request Script

    Word-for-word script to ask for referrals without feeling awkward.

  • Past Customer Reactivation Script

    How to win back past clients and turn them into referral machines.

  • Local Group Post Templates

    3 proven templates for Facebook, Nextdoor, and local forums.

  • Business Card & Flyer Drop Plan

    Where to drop cards, how many to print, and what to say on the card.

  • Cold DM Scripts

    5 different approaches depending on your style and audience.

  • Offer Urgency Builder

    How to create time-sensitive offers that accelerate buying decisions.

  • 7-Day Action Calendar

    Day-by-day schedule showing exactly what to do and when.

  • Lead Tracking Sheet

    Printable spreadsheet to track every lead and measure your progress.

Numbers That Matter

5-15 Leads in First 48 Hours
70+ Contacts Per Week
3-5 Bookings Per Week
$0 Ad Spend Required
